summary: Comprehensive testing of OSM-related features completed. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All OSM flows working correctly including 'Simulate City in 3D' button, success banner, 2D/3D rendering of OSM network.
critical_code_review_comments: OSM import with Nominatim + Photon fallback working correctly
Offline fallback for bogus place names works as designed (returns Chennai data)
ThreeViewer.js correctly rebuilds geometry when lastLayoutKey changes after OSM load
test_credentials: None required - all endpoints are public
context_for_next_testing_agent: All OSM features working: /api/osm/import returns live data with >50 nodes/edges, /api/osm/load_sim loads OSM into simulator with autostart, sim state shows 'O' prefix nodes after OSM load, simulation keeps stepping. Frontend 'Simulate City in 3D' button works, success banner shows loaded stats, 2D canvas and 3D viewer both render OSM network with traffic light poles.

TestOSMImport.test_osm_import_koramangala_returns_live: PASSED - Returns source=live/hit with >50 nodes, >50 edges, geocoder=nominatim/photon

TestOSMLoadSim.test_osm_load_sim_koramangala: PASSED - Returns ok:true, loaded:{nodes, edges, signals}, running:true
TestOSMLoadSim.test_osm_load_sim_bogus_place_uses_offli: PASSED - Returns offline_fallback source for bogus place

TestSimStateAfterOSMLoad.test_sim_state_has_osm_nodes: PASSED - Nodes have 'O' prefix IDs after OSM load

hero_section.details: Hero start button (data-testid='hero-start-btn') visible, KPI cards showing live data

osm_section.details: OSM simulate button (data-testid='osm-simulate-btn') with label 'Simulate City in 3D' visible, place input defaults to 'Koramangala, Bengaluru, India'

osm_load_flow.details: Clicking 'Simulate City in 3D' loads OSM and shows success banner '✅ Loaded into live simulator — 180 nodes, 177 edges, 14 signals' within 1 second

2d_canvas_osm.details: 2D sim canvas (data-testid='sim-canvas') renders non-grid OSM road network with 200 vehicles

3d_viewer_osm.details: Three.js 3D viewer (data-testid='three-canvas') rebuilds to show OSM geometry with traffic light poles at signal nodes

policy_buttons.details: Fixed/Pressure/Learned policy buttons all work correctly, policy tag updates

ml_training_section.details: Training status idle, metrics chart visible, summary shows best_avg_reward=-73.16

v2x_messages.details: V2X panel shows real events (EMERGENCY_PREEMPT, PHASE_CHANGE)

osm_fix_verification.nominatim_url_fix: VERIFIED - Using nominatim.openstreetmap.org (not .de which doesn't resolve)
osm_fix_verification.photon_fallback: VERIFIED - Photon geocoder (photon.komoot.io) available as fallback
osm_fix_verification.live_osm_data: VERIFIED - Returns 3556+ nodes for Koramangala from live Overpass API
osm_fix_verification.osm_load_sim_endpoint: VERIFIED - POST /api/osm/load_sim imports OSM and rebuilds VehicleSim on real OSM network
